USER_IMAGE.INVALID_FILE_SIGNATURE: Invalid file content. Image signature was not recognized.
USER_IMAGE.INVALID_OWNER: The image must be linked to a valid owner.
USER_IMAGE.IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT: The same idempotency key was reused with a different payload.

AUTH.PERMISSION_INSUFFICIENT: Insufficient permission to access this resource.
